quant.stem: Four students contributed to a charity drive, and the average amount contributed by each student was $20. If no student gave more than $25, what is the minimum amount that any student could have contributed?

21 people per minute enter an empty train station beginning at 7:00:00 pm. Every 9 minutes starting at 7:04:00 pm, a train comes and everyone who entered in the last 9 minutes boards. If the last train comes at 8:25:00, what is the average number of people who get on each train?

quant.quantity_a: z − x

quant.stem: The average of a set of 18 consecutive integers is 22.5. What is the smallest integer in the set?
quant.explanation: 18개 연속 정수의 평균=22.5이면 가운데 두 수=22와 23. 가장 작은 수=22−8=14.

quant.context: 3 numbers have a range of 2 and a median of 4.4.
quant.quantity_a: The greatest of the numbers

choices.D: The relationship cannot be determined from the information given.

quant.explanation: 순서: a≤4.4≤b, b−a=2. b는 4.4보다 크기만 하면 되고 정확한 값을 알 수 없다. b>4.4일 수도 있고 b<5.4일 수도 있으므로 비교 불가.

quant.stem: Mike, Scott, Jim, Kate, and Pete each have a different number of assignments. Pete < Kate, Kate > Mike, Mike > Jim, Jim > Scott. Which of the following could be the person with the median number of assignments? (Indicate all that apply.)
quant.explanation: 확정 순서: Scott<Jim<Mike<Kate. Pete의 위치 불명. Kate=최다(median 불가). Scott=최소(median 불가). Mike, Jim, Pete는 중앙값 가능.

quant.stem: The greatest of the 21 positive integers in a certain list is 16. The median of the 21 integers is 10. What is the least possible average (arithmetic mean) of the 21 integers?

A researcher report states that the average of 120 measurements was 72.5, the greatest was 92.8, and the range was 51.6. Which of the following statistics can be determined from this information? (Indicate all such statistics.)

choices.C: The standard deviation of the 120 measurements.

quant.explanation: A) 최솟값=최댓값−범위=92.8−51.6=41.2 ✓. D) 합=평균×개수=72.5×120=8,700 ✓. B,C는 개별 값 없이는 알 수 없음.

quant.stem: A company has 80 employees each with a different salary. Mark's salary is the second highest in the first quartile. If 8 new employees are hired at salaries lower than the lowest of the 80 salaries, what would Mark's salary rank be among the 88 salaries?
quant.explanation: Mark의 위치: 80명 중 19번째(밑에서). 8명 추가 후: 27번째. 88명 기준 Q1=1~22, Q2=23~44. Mark=Q2에서 27−22=5번째. 5th lowest in Q2.

quant.context: List S: a, b, c, d, e (a < b < c < d < e). List T: a−2, b−1, c, d+1, e+2.
quant.quantity_a: The standard deviation of the numbers in list S
quant.quantity_b: The standard deviation of the numbers in list T

choices.D: The relationship cannot be determined from the information given.

quant.explanation: T는 c를 기준으로 S보다 값들이 더 퍼져 있다. 분산이 커지므로 표준편차도 크다. QB>QA.

quant.stem: A and B are graphical representations of normally distributed variables X and Y, respectively. Y's graph is wider and shifted to the right compared to X's. Which of the following must be true? (Indicate all such statements.)

choices.A: Y has a larger standard deviation than X.
choices.B: The probability that Y falls within 2 standard deviations of its mean is larger than the probability that X falls within 2 standard deviations of its mean.
choices.C: Y has a larger mean than X.

quant.explanation: A) Y 그래프가 더 넓게 퍼져 있으므로 표준편차 더 크다 ✓. B) 정규분포에서 평균 ±2SD 이내 확률은 항상 동일(~95.4%) ✗. C) Y 그래프가 오른쪽으로 이동했으므로 평균 더 크다 ✓.

quant.stem: On a particular test whose scores are normally distributed, the 2nd percentile is 1,720 while the 84th percentile is 1,990. What score most closely corresponds to the 16th percentile?
quant.explanation: 2nd percentile≈mean−2SD=1720. 84th percentile=mean+1SD=1990. 3SD=270, SD=90, mean=1900. 16th percentile=mean−1SD=1900−90=1810.

quant.context: The test scores at Millbrook High School are normally distributed, and the 60th percentile is equal to a score of 70.

quant.stem: Set S = {5, 10, 15}. If the number 15 is removed and replaced with the number 1,000, which of the following would change? (Indicate all such statements.)
quant.explanation: 새 집합={5,10,1000}. A) 합이 달라지므로 평균 변함 ✓. B) 중앙값=10으로 유지 ✗. C) 평균이 달라지므로 표준편차 변함 ✓.

quant.context: A random variable Y is normally distributed with a mean of 200 and a standard deviation of 10.

choices.D: The relationship cannot be determined from the information given.

quant.explanation: 220=mean+2SD. P(Y>220)≈2.5%. 1/6≈16.7%. Quantity B가 더 크다.
